entries.translation: • 审查 Claude Code 的更改

entries.original: in the comfort of your IDE
entries.translation: 在你的 IDE 中轻松完成

entries.original: to reference files or lines in your input
entries.translation: 在输入中引用文件或行

entries.original: Grant the missing permissions in System Settings, then select "Try again". macOS may require you to restart Claude Code after granting Screen Recording.
entries.translation: 请在系统设置中授予缺失的权限，然后选择「重试」。macOS 可能需要你在授予屏幕录制权限后重启 Claude Code。

entries.original: Deny, and tell Claude what to do differently
entries.translation: 拒绝，并告诉 Claude 应该怎么做

entries.original: will be hidden while Claude works.
entries.translation: 将在 Claude 工作时隐藏。

entries.original: Advisor has reviewed the conversation and will apply the feedback
entries.translation: 顾问已审查对话并将应用反馈

entries.original: Advisor has reviewed the conversation and will apply the feedback
entries.translation: 顾问已审查对话并将应用反馈

entries.original: Your organization has configured managed settings that could allow execution of arbitrary code or interception of your prompts and responses.
entries.translation: 你的组织已配置的托管设置可能允许执行任意代码或拦截你的提示和响应。

entries.original: Only accept if you trust your organization's IT administration and expect these settings to be configured.
entries.translation: 仅在你信任组织的 IT 管理员且预期这些设置会被配置时才接受。

entries.original: Successfully logged out from your Anthropic account.
entries.translation: 已成功退出你的 Anthropic 账户。

entries.original: Please restart your IDE and try again.
entries.translation: 请重启你的 IDE 然后重试。

entries.original: Claude Code uses the standard AWS credential chain. Pick the method you already use with the AWS CLI.
entries.translation: Claude Code 使用标准的 AWS 凭证链。请选择你在 AWS CLI 中已使用的方式。
请粘贴你的 Bedrock API 密钥。

entries.original: Generate one in the AWS console under Bedrock → API keys.
entries.translation: 在 AWS 控制台的 Bedrock → API keys 下生成一个。

entries.original: These will be written to ~/.claude/settings.json under env:
entries.translation: 这些将写入 ~/.claude/settings.json 的 env 下：

entries.original: Without pinning, Claude Code uses its built-in defaults. When a new model ships, your install will try to call it even if your account has not yet enabled it — Claude Code will fail to connect to Bedrock until you enable the model or pin to one you have.
entries.translation: 不固定版本时，Claude Code 使用内置默认值。当新模型发布时，你的安装会尝试调用它，即使你的账户尚未启用——Claude Code 将无法连接 Bedrock，直到你启用该模型或固定到一个已有的版本。

entries.original: Each candidate is tested with a one-token request:
entries.translation: 每个候选模型通过单 token 请求进行测试：
来自 ~/.aws/config 的名称（[profile …] 之后）。
个配置文件——数量过多无法列出。

entries.original: If this is an SSO profile, run `aws sso login --profile NAME` first.
entries.translation: 如果这是 SSO 配置文件，请先运行 `aws sso login --profile NAME`。

entries.original: Where your Bedrock models are enabled.
entries.translation: 你的 Bedrock 模型启用的区域。

entries.original: Claude Code reads this from AWS_REGION, not ~/.aws/config — set it explicitly even if your profile has a region.
entries.translation: Claude Code 从 AWS_REGION 读取此值，而非 ~/.aws/config——即使你的配置文件已设置区域，也请显式设置。

entries.original: Only needed for temporary credentials from STS. Leave empty for long-lived keys.
entries.translation: 仅在使用 STS 临时凭证时需要。长期密钥请留空。

entries.original: Claude Code uses the standard GCP credential chain. Pick the method you already use with gcloud or in your deployment.
entries.translation: Claude Code 使用标准的 GCP 凭证链。请选择你在 gcloud 或部署中已使用的方式。

entries.original: Without pinning, Claude Code uses its built-in defaults. When a new model ships, your install will try to call it even if it is not yet available in your project — Claude Code will fail to connect to Vertex AI until you enable the model or pin to one you have.
entries.translation: 不固定版本时，Claude Code 使用内置默认值。当新模型发布时，你的安装会尝试调用它，即使你的项目中尚不可用——Claude Code 将无法连接 Vertex AI，直到你启用该模型或固定到一个已有的版本。

entries.original: versions on Vertex AI · each tested with a one-token request.
entries.translation: 个版本在 Vertex AI 上 · 每个通过单 token 请求测试。
在你的 gcloud 配置中。

entries.original: The project where Vertex AI is enabled.
entries.translation: 启用了 Vertex AI 的项目。
个项目——数量过多无法列出。

entries.original: Find it with `gcloud config get-value project` or in the GCP console header.
entries.translation: 可通过 `gcloud config get-value project` 或 GCP 控制台顶部找到。

entries.original: Where Claude models are served from.
Use 'global' for the multi-region endpoint (recommended), or a specific location like us-east5 if you have regional quota.
entries.translation: 使用 'global' 作为多区域端点（推荐），或使用特定位置如 us-east5（如果你有区域配额）。

entries.original: Path to the service account JSON key file.
entries.translation: 服务账户 JSON 密钥文件的路径。

entries.original: Download one from the GCP console under IAM → Service Accounts → Keys → Add key.
entries.translation: 在 GCP 控制台的 IAM → Service Accounts → Keys → Add key 下下载。

entries.original: Browser didn't open? Use the url below to sign in
entries.translation: 浏览器未打开？请使用下方链接登录
✓ 长期认证令牌创建成功！
你的 OAuth 令牌（有效期 1 年）：

entries.original: Store this token securely. You won't be able to see it again.
entries.translation: 请安全保存此令牌。你将无法再次查看。

entries.original: Use this token by setting: export CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN=<token>
entries.translation: 通过以下方式使用此令牌：export CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN=<token>

entries.original: Amazon Bedrock, Microsoft Foundry, or Vertex AI
entries.translation: Amazon Bedrock、Microsoft Foundry 或 Vertex AI
正在打开浏览器以登录…

entries.original: Creating API key for Claude Code…
entries.translation: 正在为 Claude Code 创建 API 密钥…

entries.original: · Run in another terminal: security unlock-keychain
entries.translation: · 在另一个终端中运行：security unlock-keychain

entries.original: We are experiencing high demand for Opus 4.
To continue immediately, use /model to switch to
entries.translation: 如需立即继续，请使用 /model 切换到

entries.original: Teammate is continuing to work. You may request shutdown again later.
entries.translation: 队友正在继续工作。你可以稍后再次请求关闭。

entries.original: You can now proceed with implementation. Your plan mode restrictions have been lifted.
entries.translation: 你现在可以开始实施了。计划模式限制已解除。

entries.original: Please revise your plan based on the feedback and call ExitPlanMode again.
entries.translation: 请根据反馈修改你的计划，然后再次调用 ExitPlanMode。

entries.original: [Image data detected and sent to Claude]
entries.translation: [已检测到图片数据并发送给 Claude]
用户拒绝了 Claude 的计划：
被自动模式分类器拒绝
被自动模式分类器允许
正在检查 git 状态

entries.original: Teleport will switch git branches. The following changes were found:
entries.translation: Teleport 将切换 git 分支。发现以下更改：

entries.original: Would you like to stash these changes and continue with teleport?
entries.translation: 是否暂存这些更改并继续 teleport？
Teleport 需要一个 Claude.ai 账户。

entries.original: Your Claude Pro/Max subscription will be used by Claude Code.
entries.translation: Claude Code 将使用你的 Claude Pro/Max 订阅。

entries.original: To use native iTerm2 split panes for teammates, you need the
entries.translation: 要使用原生 iTerm2 分屏显示队友，你需要

entries.original: This enables teammates to appear as split panes within your current window.
entries.translation: 这样队友就能以分屏形式显示在你当前窗口中。

entries.original: Press Enter when ready to verify…
entries.translation: 准备好后按 Enter 进行验证…

entries.original: Verifying it2 can communicate with iTerm2…
entries.translation: 正在验证 it2 与 iTerm2 的通信…

entries.original: ✓ iTerm2 split pane support is ready
Teammates will now appear as split panes.
entries.translation: 队友现在将以分屏形式显示。

entries.original: · Python API is enabled in iTerm2 preferences
entries.translation: · 已在 iTerm2 偏好设置中启用 Python API

entries.original: · You may need to restart iTerm2 after enabling
entries.translation: · 启用后可能需要重启 iTerm2

entries.original: Plan submitted for team lead approval
entries.translation: 计划已提交给团队负责人审批

entries.original: Waiting for team lead to review and approve...
entries.translation: 等待团队负责人审查和批准...
用户批准了 Claude 的计划
用户回答了 Claude 的问题：

entries.original: Claude is now exploring and designing an implementation approach.
entries.translation: Claude 正在探索并设计实现方案。

entries.original: User declined to enter plan mode
entries.translation: 用户拒绝进入规划模式
笔记本中未找到单元格
自上次读取以来未更改

entries.original: Claude Code will be able to read files in this directory and make edits when auto-accept edits is on.
entries.translation: Claude Code 将能够读取此目录中的文件，并在自动接受编辑开启时进行修改。

entries.original: Enter the path to the directory:
Edit and press Enter to retry, or Esc to cancel
entries.translation: 编辑后按 Enter 重试，或按 Esc 取消

entries.original: We will use your feedback to debug related issues or to improve
entries.translation: 我们将使用您的反馈来调试相关问题或改进

entries.original: Claude Code's functionality (eg. to reduce the risk of bugs occurring in the future).
entries.translation: Claude Code 的功能（例如降低未来出现错误的风险）。

entries.original: to open your browser and draft a GitHub issue, or any other key to close.
entries.translation: 打开浏览器并创建 GitHub issue，或按其他任意键关闭。

entries.original: This command configures when auto-compaction happens. The actual threshold is the minimum of this setting and your model's context window.
entries.translation: 此命令配置自动压缩的触发时机。实际阈值取此设置与模型上下文窗口的较小值。
自动压缩当前已禁用（见 /config）

entries.original: CLAUDE_CODE_AUTO_COMPACT_WINDOW is set and takes precedence. Unset it to change this setting here.
entries.translation: CLAUDE_CODE_AUTO_COMPACT_WINDOW 已设置且优先生效。取消设置后才能在此更改。
经得起考验的长上下文

entries.original: Both Opus 4.6 and Sonnet 4.6 achieve state-of-the-art scores on long-context retrieval benchmarks at 1M tokens — Opus 4.6 scores 78.3% on MRCR v2, the highest among frontier models at that length. Opus 4.6 includes 1M context at standard pricing; Sonnet 4.6 1M is available with overages.
entries.translation: Opus 4.6 和 Sonnet 4.6 在 1M token 的长上下文检索基准测试中均达到了最先进的水平——Opus 4.6 在 MRCR v2 上得分 78.3%，是该长度下前沿模型中的最高分。Opus 4.6 以标准定价包含 1M 上下文；Sonnet 4.6 1M 可通过额外用量获取。

entries.original: Choose the text style that looks best with your terminal
entries.translation: 选择最适合你终端的文本样式

entries.original: for this session (set by plan mode). Selecting a model will undo this.
entries.translation: 用于本次会话（由规划模式设置）。选择模型将撤销此设置。

entries.original: only (/fast). Switching to other models turn off fast mode.
entries.translation: (/fast)。切换到其他模型将关闭快速模式。

entries.original: This project's CLAUDE.md imports files outside the current working directory. Never allow this for third-party repositories.
entries.translation: 此项目的 CLAUDE.md 导入了当前工作目录之外的文件。切勿对第三方仓库允许此操作。

entries.original: Important: Only use Claude Code with files you trust. Accessing untrusted files may pose security risks
entries.translation: 重要提示: 仅对您信任的文件使用 Claude Code。访问不受信任的文件可能存在安全风险

entries.original: The stable channel may have an older version than what you're currently running (
entries.translation: 稳定版通道的版本可能比您当前运行的版本更旧 (

entries.original: How would you like to handle this?
This changes how Claude Code communicates with you
entries.translation: 此选项更改 Claude Code 与您的交流方式

entries.original: Enter your preferred response and voice language:
entries.translation: 输入您偏好的回复和语音语言:
留空则使用默认语言（英语）
使用自定义 API 密钥:

entries.original: Changing thinking mode mid-conversation will increase latency and may reduce quality.
entries.translation: 在对话中途更改思考模式会增加延迟并可能降低质量。

entries.original: /usage is only available for subscription plans.
Extra usage not enabled · /extra-usage to enable
entries.translation: 额外用量未启用 · 使用 /extra-usage 启用
正在加载您的 Claude Code 统计数据…

entries.original: No stats available yet. Start using Claude Code!
entries.translation: 暂无统计数据。开始使用 Claude Code 吧！

entries.original: · r to cycle dates · ctrl+s to copy
entries.translation: · r 切换日期 · ctrl+s 复制
二进制文件 - 无法显示差异

entries.original: Large file - diff exceeds 1 MB limit
entries.translation: 大文件 - 差异超过 1 MB 限制
… 差异已截断（超过 400 行限制）

entries.original: For help configuring MCP servers, see:
entries.translation: 有关配置 MCP 服务器的帮助，请参阅:
运行 /sandbox 查看安装说明
└ 已跳过版本检查（仅必要流量模式）

entries.original: double tap esc to clear input
entries.translation: 双击 esc 清除输入

entries.original: Claude understands your codebase, makes edits with your permission, and executes commands — right from your terminal.
entries.translation: Claude 理解你的代码库，在你许可下进行编辑，并直接在终端中执行命令。

entries.original: to learn the features most people miss.
entries.translation: 了解大多数人忽略的功能。

entries.original: You can also configure this in /config or with the --ide flag
entries.translation: 你也可以在 /config 中或通过 --ide 参数进行配置

entries.original: Note: Only one Claude Code instance can be connected to VS Code at a time.
entries.translation: 注意: 同一时间只能有一个 Claude Code 实例连接到 VS Code。

entries.original: Tip: You can enable auto-connect to IDE in /config or with the --ide flag
entries.translation: 提示: 你可以在 /config 中或通过 --ide 参数启用自动连接 IDE

entries.original: other running IDE(s). However, their workspace/project directories do not match the current cwd.
entries.translation: 个其他运行中的 IDE。但其工作区/项目目录与当前工作目录不匹配。

entries.original: More workflow examples (issue triage, CI fixes, etc.) at:
entries.translation: 更多工作流示例（issue 分类、CI 修复等）请参阅:

entries.translation: 您必须至少选择一个工作流才能继续

entries.original: Use your existing Claude Code API key
entries.translation: 使用您现有的 Claude Code API 密钥

entries.original: Create a long-lived token with your Claude subscription
entries.translation: 使用您的 Claude 订阅创建长期令牌
输入新的 API 密钥

entries.translation: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY 已存在于仓库密钥中！
使用现有的 API 密钥

entries.original: Create a new secret with a different name
entries.translation: 使用其他名称创建新密钥

entries.translation: 输入新密钥名称（字母数字和下划线）:

entries.translation: 请输入仓库名称以继续

entries.translation: Claude 工作流文件已存在于

View the latest workflow template at:

entries.translation: 如果浏览器未自动打开，请访问:

Important: Make sure to grant access to this specific repository
entries.translation: 重要: 请确保授权访问此特定仓库

Having trouble? See manual setup instructions at:
entries.translation: 遇到问题？请参阅手动设置说明:

entries.translation: 正在为 GitHub Actions 创建长期令牌

entries.original: Opening browser to sign in with your Claude account…
entries.translation: 正在打开浏览器以登录您的 Claude 账户…

entries.original: Using token for GitHub Actions setup…
entries.translation: 正在使用令牌配置 GitHub Actions…

entries.original: Press Enter to try again, or any other key to cancel
entries.translation: 按 Enter 重试，或按其他任意键取消

entries.translation: 按任意键返回 API 密钥选择
✓ GitHub Actions 工作流已创建！
✓ 使用现有的 ANTHROPIC_API_KEY 密钥

entries.original: 1. Install the Claude GitHub App if you haven't already
entries.translation: 1. 如果尚未安装，请安装 Claude GitHub App

entries.original: 2. Your workflow file was kept unchanged
entries.translation: 2. 您的工作流文件保持不变

entries.original: 3. API key is configured and ready to use
entries.translation: 3. API 密钥已配置并可使用

entries.original: 1. A pre-filled PR page has been created
entries.translation: 1. 已创建预填充的 PR 页面

entries.original: 2. Install the Claude GitHub App if you haven't already
entries.translation: 2. 如果尚未安装，请安装 Claude GitHub App

entries.original: 3. Merge the PR to enable Claude PR assistance
entries.translation: 3. 合并 PR 以启用 Claude PR 协助

entries.original: We found some potential issues, but you can continue anyway
entries.translation: 我们发现了一些潜在问题，但您仍可继续

entries.original: You can also try the manual setup steps if needed:
entries.translation: 如需要，您也可以尝试手动设置步骤:

entries.original: A browser window will open for authentication
entries.translation: 将打开浏览器窗口进行认证

entries.original: If your browser doesn't open automatically, copy this URL manually:
entries.translation: 如果浏览器未自动打开，请手动复制此 URL:

entries.original: Return here after authenticating in your browser.
entries.translation: 在浏览器中完成认证后返回此处。

entries.original: This server connects only when running the agent.
entries.translation: 此服务器仅在运行代理时连接。
正在建立与 MCP 服务器的连接

entries.original: If your browser doesn't open automatically, copy this URL manually
entries.translation: 如果浏览器没有自动打开，请手动复制此 URL

entries.original: If the redirect page shows a connection error, paste the URL from your browser's address bar:
entries.translation: 如果重定向页面显示连接错误，请粘贴浏览器地址栏中的 URL：

entries.original: Return here after authenticating in your browser. Press
entries.translation: 在浏览器中完成认证后返回此处。按下
在浏览器中完成认证后继续。

entries.original: Find the MCP server in the browser and click "Disconnect".
entries.translation: 在浏览器中找到 MCP 服务器并点击"断开连接"。

entries.original: If your browser didn't open automatically, copy this URL manually
entries.translation: 如果浏览器没有自动打开，请手动复制此 URL

entries.original: This will open claude.ai in the browser. Find the MCP server in the list and click "Disconnect".
entries.translation: 这将在浏览器中打开 claude.ai。在列表中找到 MCP 服务器并点击"断开连接"。

entries.original: This may take a few moments.

entries.translation: 正在重启 MCP 服务器进程

entries.original: Tab: Next field · Enter: Save and continue
entries.translation: Tab: 下一字段 · Enter: 保存并继续

entries.original: Make sure you trust a plugin before installing, updating, or using it. Anthropic does not control what MCP servers, files, or other software are included in plugins and cannot verify that they will work as intended or that they won't change. See each plugin's homepage for more information.
entries.translation: 在安装、更新或使用插件之前，请确保您信任该插件。Anthropic 不控制插件中包含的 MCP 服务器、文件或其他软件，也无法验证它们是否按预期工作或不会发生变化。请参阅每个插件的主页了解更多信息。

entries.original: · Component summary not available for remote plugin
entries.translation: · 远程插件的组件摘要不可用

entries.original: · Components will be discovered at installation
No new plugins available to install.
All plugins from this marketplace are already installed.
entries.translation: 此市场的所有插件均已安装。

entries.original: Git is required to install marketplaces.
Please install git and restart Claude Code.
entries.translation: 请安装 git 并重启 Claude Code。

entries.original: Your organization policy does not allow any external marketplaces.
entries.translation: 您的组织策略不允许使用任何外部市场。

entries.original: Your organization restricts which marketplaces can be added.
entries.translation: 您的组织限制了可添加的市场。

entries.original: Switch to the Marketplaces tab to view allowed sources.
entries.translation: 切换到市场选项卡查看允许的来源。

entries.original: All available plugins are already installed.
entries.translation: 所有可用插件均已安装。

entries.original: Check for new plugins later or add more marketplaces.
entries.translation: 稍后检查新插件或添加更多市场。

entries.original: All available plugins are installed for this project.
entries.translation: 此项目的所有可用插件均已安装。

entries.original: Use the Browse tab to install at user scope.
entries.translation: 使用浏览选项卡在用户范围安装。

entries.original: Add a marketplace first using the Marketplaces tab.
entries.translation: 请先使用市场选项卡添加市场。

entries.original: Auto-update enabled. Claude Code will automatically update this marketplace and its installed plugins.
entries.translation: 已启用自动更新。Claude Code 将自动更新此市场及其已安装的插件。
正在加载已安装的插件…

entries.original: No plugins or MCP servers installed.
entries.translation: 未安装任何插件或 MCP 服务器。
已从市场移除 · 原因:

entries.original: is enabled in .claude/settings.json (shared with your team)
entries.translation: 已在 .claude/settings.json 中启用（与团队共享）

entries.original: Disable it just for you in .claude/settings.local.json?
entries.translation: 是否仅为您在 .claude/settings.local.json 中禁用？

entries.original: This has the same effect as uninstalling, without affecting other contributors.
entries.translation: 效果与卸载相同，但不会影响其他贡献者。

entries.original: Delete it along with the plugin?
entries.translation: 是否连同插件一起删除？

entries.original: Managed by your organization — contact your admin
entries.translation: 由您的组织管理 — 请联系管理员
/plugin manage - 管理已安装的插件
/plugin marketplace add <path/url> - 直接添加市场
/plugin marketplace update <name> - 更新指定市场
/plugin marketplace remove <name> - 移除指定市场
/plugin marketplace list - 列出所有市场

entries.original: /plugin validate <path> - Validate a manifest file or directory
entries.translation: /plugin validate <path> - 验证清单文件或目录

entries.original: anywhere in your prompt to fuzzy-find and attach a file. Claude reads it before answering — no more pasting code.
entries.translation: 在提示中的任意位置进行模糊查找并附加文件。Claude 会在回答前读取它 — 无需再粘贴代码。

entries.original: and Claude jumps straight there. Works in both directions: Claude cites files the same way, so you can click to open them in your editor.
entries.translation: 引用特定行，Claude 会直接跳转到那里。双向均可使用：Claude 以相同方式引用文件，您可以点击在编辑器中打开。

entries.original: to attach a whole directory tree.
to cycle permission modes. Each mode changes how much Claude asks before acting:
entries.translation: 切换权限模式。每种模式决定 Claude 在操作前询问的程度:
— 自由编辑，执行命令前询问

entries.original: — research and propose, never touch files
entries.translation: — 仅研究和建议，不修改文件
— Claude 自行判断安全操作

entries.original: for big refactors you want to review first. Use
entries.translation: 适用于需要先审查的大型重构。使用
适用于长时间无人值守的任务。运行

entries.original: to pre-allow specific commands so Claude stops asking about them.
entries.translation: 来预先允许特定命令，让 Claude 不再询问。

entries.original: Claude checkpoints your files before every edit. Press
entries.translation: Claude 在每次编辑前都会为文件创建检查点。按下

entries.original: and roll back to any prior state — code, conversation, or both.
entries.translation: 回滚到任意之前的状态 — 代码、对话或两者兼有。

entries.original: Went down the wrong path? Rewind to before the detour and try a different prompt. Your git history stays clean.
entries.translation: 走错了方向？回退到岔路之前，尝试不同的提示。您的 git 历史保持干净。

entries.original: forks the conversation to try two approaches.
entries.translation: 分叉对话以尝试两种方案。

entries.original: Long builds and test suites do not have to block you. Add
entries.translation: 长时间的构建和测试不必阻塞您。添加

entries.original: to any bash command and it runs in the background — you keep chatting, Claude notifies you when it finishes.
entries.translation: 到任意 bash 命令即可后台运行 — 您可以继续聊天，完成时 Claude 会通知您。

entries.original: to see everything in flight. Claude can read task output mid-run and react to failures automatically.
entries.translation: 查看所有进行中的任务。Claude 可以在运行中读取任务输出并自动应对失败。

entries.original: Subagents and workflows also run as tasks — it is all one queue.
entries.translation: 子代理和工作流也作为任务运行 — 都在同一个队列中。

entries.original: file in your repo and Claude reads it at the start of every session. Put your conventions there: test commands, style rules, do-not-touch directories.
entries.translation: 文件，Claude 会在每次会话开始时读取它。在其中写入您的约定：测试命令、代码风格规则、禁止修改的目录。

entries.original: to generate a starter CLAUDE.md from your codebase. Run
entries.translation: 从代码库生成初始 CLAUDE.md。运行

entries.original: Works at three levels: repo, your home directory (all projects), and per-directory overrides.
entries.translation: 支持三个层级：仓库、主目录（所有项目）和按目录覆盖。

entries.original: MCP servers give Claude new tools: read your Slack, query your database, control your browser. Run
entries.translation: MCP 服务器为 Claude 提供新工具：读取 Slack、查询数据库、控制浏览器。运行

entries.original: Once connected, tools appear automatically — ask Claude to "check my calendar" or "search our Notion" and it just works.
entries.translation: 连接后，工具会自动出现 — 让 Claude "查看我的日历"或"搜索我们的 Notion"即可使用。

entries.original: claude mcp add my-server -- npx some-mcp-pkg
entries.translation: claude mcp add my-server -- npx some-mcp-pkg

entries.original: to wire one up without leaving the terminal.
entries.translation: 无需离开终端即可连接。

entries.original: — type it, Claude runs it. Run
Hooks run your own scripts on events: before a tool call, after a response, on session start. Use them to enforce rules, log activity, or inject context. Run
entries.translation: 钩子在事件触发时运行您的脚本：工具调用前、响应后、会话开始时。用于执行规则、记录活动或注入上下文。运行

entries.original: to let Claude review PRs when tagged.
entries.translation: 让 Claude 在被标记时审查 PR。

entries.original: Claude can spawn copies of itself to work in parallel. Ask it to "use subagents to search these 5 directories" and watch the fan-out.
entries.translation: Claude 可以生成自身的副本并行工作。让它"使用子代理搜索这 5 个目录"即可看到并行展开。

entries.original: — a test runner, a code reviewer, a docs writer — each with its own tools and instructions. Run
entries.translation: 中定义专用代理 — 测试运行器、代码审查器、文档编写器 — 各有自己的工具和指令。运行

entries.original: Subagents run in isolated context. For true parallel sessions on separate branches, launch with
entries.translation: 子代理在隔离上下文中运行。要在不同分支上实现真正的并行会话，请使用

entries.original: and this terminal becomes visible on your phone and at claude.ai/code. Watch output, send prompts, approve tool calls — all from another device while this session keeps running.
entries.translation: 后此终端即可在手机和 claude.ai/code 上可见。在其他设备上查看输出、发送提示、批准工具调用 — 同时此会话持续运行。

entries.original: Started a session on the web and want to move it here? Run
entries.translation: 在网页上启动了会话想移到这里？运行

entries.original: to pull it into this terminal with full history.
entries.translation: 将其连同完整历史拉取到此终端。

entries.original: Kick off a long task, close your laptop, check progress from your phone.
entries.translation: 启动长时间任务，合上笔记本电脑，在手机上查看进度。

entries.original: to switch models. Opus for hard problems, Sonnet for most work, Haiku for quick questions. Each trades speed for depth.
entries.translation: 切换模型。Opus 处理难题，Sonnet 应对日常工作，Haiku 回答快速问题。各在速度与深度间取舍。

entries.original: controls how long Claude thinks before answering.
entries.translation: 控制 Claude 回答前的思考时长。

entries.original: when you just need a quick edit.
toggles fast mode — same model, faster output.
entries.translation: 切换快速模式 — 相同模型，更快输出。

entries.original: Select a version to view its notes.
entries.translation: 选择版本查看更新说明。

entries.original: Channels require claude.ai authentication · run /login, then restart
entries.translation: 频道需要 claude.ai 认证 · 运行 /login 然后重启

entries.original: Inbound messages will be silently dropped
entries.translation: 入站消息将被静默丢弃

entries.original: Have an administrator set channelsEnabled: true in managed settings to enable
entries.translation: 请管理员在托管设置中设置 channelsEnabled: true 以启用
正在监听来自以下频道的消息:

entries.original: Experimental · inbound messages will be pushed into this session, this carries prompt injection risks. Restart Claude Code without
entries.translation: 实验性功能 · 入站消息将被推送到此会话，存在提示注入风险。重启 Claude Code 时不使用

entries.original: Your bash commands will be sandboxed. Disable with /sandbox.
entries.translation: 您的 bash 命令将在沙箱中运行。使用 /sandbox 禁用。
认证冲突: 正在使用

entries.original: instead of Claude account subscription token. Either unset
entries.translation: 而非 Claude 账户订阅令牌。请取消设置

entries.translation: 而非 Anthropic Console 密钥。请取消设置

entries.translation: ）均已设置。这可能导致意外行为。

entries.translation: 大量累积的代理描述会影响性能（约

entries.translation: 当前不在远程模式下。使用 `claude --remote` 启动以使用此命令。
在 .claude/skills/ 或 ~/.claude/skills/ 中创建技能
插件技能通过 /plugin 管理

entries.original: This will terminate the Claude Code on the web session.
entries.translation: 这将终止网页端的 Claude Code 会话。

entries.original: This archives the remote session and stops local tracking. The review will not complete and any findings so far are discarded.
entries.translation: 这将归档远程会话并停止本地追踪。审查将不会完成，目前的所有发现将被丢弃。

entries.original: Sorry, Claude Code encountered an error
entries.translation: 抱歉，Claude Code 遇到了错误
任何以此开头的 Bash 命令

entries.original: Permission rules are a tool name, optionally followed by a specifier in parentheses.
entries.translation: 权限规则由工具名称组成，后面可选择在括号中添加限定符。

entries.original: No recent denials. Commands denied by the auto mode classifier will appear here.
entries.translation: 没有最近的拒绝记录。被自动模式分类器拒绝的命令将显示在此处。

entries.original: Commands recently denied by the auto mode classifier.
entries.translation: 最近被自动模式分类器拒绝的命令。

entries.original: Claude Code will no longer have access to files in this directory.
entries.translation: Claude Code 将不再能访问此目录中的文件。

entries.original: This rule is configured by managed settings and cannot be modified.
entries.translation: 此规则由托管设置配置，无法修改。

entries.original: Contact your system administrator for more information.
entries.translation: 请联系系统管理员了解更多信息。

entries.original: Are you sure you want to delete this permission rule?
entries.translation: 确定要删除此权限规则吗？

entries.original: Claude Code can read files in the workspace, and make edits when auto-accept edits is on.
entries.translation: Claude Code 可以读取工作区中的文件，开启自动接受编辑后还可进行修改。
←/→ 切换标签 · ↓ 返回 · Esc 取消

entries.original: Type to filter · Enter/↓ select · ↑ tabs · Esc clear
entries.translation: 输入筛选 · Enter/↓ 选择 · ↑ 标签 · Esc 清除

entries.original: Enter approve · r retry · ↑↓ navigate · ←/→ switch · Esc cancel
entries.translation: Enter 批准 · r 重试 · ↑↓ 导航 · ←/→ 切换 · Esc 取消

entries.original: ↑↓ navigate · Enter select · Type to search · ←/→ switch · Esc cancel
entries.translation: ↑↓ 导航 · Enter 选择 · 输入搜索 · ←/→ 切换 · Esc 取消
加载访客通行证信息中…

entries.original: Guest passes are not currently available.
entries.translation: 访客通行证当前不可用。

entries.original: An update to our Consumer Terms and Privacy Policy will take effect on
entries.translation: 我们的消费者条款和隐私政策的更新将于

entries.original: . You can accept the updated terms today.
entries.translation: 生效。您可以立即接受更新的条款。

entries.original: — Allow the use of your chats and coding sessions to train and improve Anthropic AI models. Change anytime in your Privacy Settings (
entries.translation: — 允许使用您的聊天和编程会话来训练和改进 Anthropic AI 模型。您可以随时在隐私设置中更改（

entries.original: — To help us improve our AI models and safety protections, we're extending data retention to 5 years.
entries.translation: — 为帮助我们改进 AI 模型和安全保护，我们将数据保留期延长至 5 年。

entries.original: ) or read the updated Consumer Terms (
We've updated our Consumer Terms and Privacy Policy.
entries.translation: 我们已更新消费者条款和隐私政策。

entries.original: Allow the use of your chats and coding sessions to train and improve Anthropic AI models. You can change this anytime in Privacy Settings
entries.translation: 允许使用您的聊天和编程会话来训练和改进 Anthropic AI 模型。您可以随时在隐私设置中更改

entries.original: Turning ON the improve Claude setting extends data retention from 30 days to 5 years. Turning it OFF keeps the default 30-day data retention. Delete data anytime.
entries.translation: 开启“改进 Claude”设置会将数据保留期从 30 天延长至 5 年。关闭则保持默认的 30 天数据保留期。您可以随时删除数据。

entries.original: Please select how you'd like to continue
entries.translation: 请选择您希望如何继续

entries.original: Your choice takes effect immediately upon confirmation.
entries.translation: 您的选择将在确认后立即生效。

entries.original: Review and manage your privacy settings at
entries.translation: 在以下位置查看和管理您的隐私设置

entries.original: Only hooks from managed settings can run. User-defined hooks from ~/.claude/settings.json, .claude/settings.json, and .claude/settings.local.json are blocked.
entries.translation: 只有来自托管设置的钩子可以运行。来自 ~/.claude/settings.json、.claude/settings.json 和 .claude/settings.local.json 的用户自定义钩子已被阻止。

entries.original: This menu is read-only. To add or modify hooks, edit settings.json directly or ask Claude.
entries.translation: 此菜单为只读。要添加或修改钩子，请直接编辑 settings.json 或让 Claude 帮助。

entries.original: No hooks configured for this event.
To add hooks, edit settings.json directly or ask Claude.
entries.translation: 要添加钩子，请直接编辑 settings.json 或让 Claude 帮助。

entries.original: To modify or remove this hook, edit settings.json directly or ask Claude to help.
entries.translation: 要修改或删除此钩子，请直接编辑 settings.json 或让 Claude 帮助。
· 不会执行任何钩子命令

entries.original: · Tool operations will proceed without hook validation
entries.translation: · 工具操作将跳过钩子验证直接执行

entries.original: To re-enable hooks, remove "disableAllHooks" from settings.json or ask Claude.
entries.translation: 要重新启用钩子，请从 settings.json 中移除 "disableAllHooks" 或让 Claude 帮助。

entries.original: (tells Claude when to use this agent):
entries.translation: （告诉 Claude 何时使用此代理）：

entries.original: Model determines the agent's reasoning capabilities and speed.
entries.translation: 模型决定代理的推理能力和速度。

entries.original: No agents found. Create specialized subagents that Claude can delegate to.
entries.translation: 未找到代理。创建专门的子代理，Claude 可以将任务委派给它们。

entries.original: Each subagent has its own context window, custom system prompt, and specific tools.
entries.translation: 每个子代理都有自己的上下文窗口、自定义系统提示和特定工具。

entries.original: Try creating: Code Reviewer, Code Simplifier, Security Reviewer, Tech Lead, or UX Reviewer.
entries.translation: 尝试创建：代码审查员、代码简化师、安全审查员、技术负责人或用户体验审查员。

entries.original: Built-in agents are provided by default and cannot be modified.
entries.translation: 内置代理为默认提供，无法修改。

entries.original: When should Claude use this agent?
entries.translation: Claude 应在何时使用此代理？
正在根据描述生成代理...

entries.original: Enter the system prompt for your agent:
Enter a unique identifier for your agent:
entries.translation: 输入代理的唯一标识符：
当前没有正在运行的子代理。

entries.original: Are you sure you want to delete the agent

entries.translation: 允许的 Unix 套接字：

entries.original: ⚠ Warning: Glob patterns not fully supported on Linux
entries.translation: ⚠ 警告：Linux 上不完全支持 Glob 模式

entries.original: The following patterns will be ignored:

entries.translation: （阻止 Unix 域套接字所需）

entries.original: · or copy vendor/seccomp/* from sandbox-runtime and set
entries.translation: · 或从 sandbox-runtime 复制 vendor/seccomp/* 并设置
settings.json 中的 sandbox.seccomp.bpfPath 和 applyPath

entries.original: Sandbox is not enabled. Enable sandbox to configure override settings.
entries.translation: 沙盒未启用。启用沙盒以配置覆盖设置。

entries.original: Override settings are managed by a higher-priority configuration and cannot be changed locally.
entries.translation: 覆盖设置由更高优先级的配置管理，无法在本地更改。

entries.original: When a command fails due to sandbox restrictions, Claude can retry with dangerouslyDisableSandbox to run outside the sandbox (falling back to default permissions).
entries.translation: 当命令因沙盒限制而失败时，Claude 可以使用 dangerouslyDisableSandbox 在沙盒外重试（回退到默认权限）。

entries.original: All bash commands invoked by the model must run in the sandbox unless they are explicitly listed in excludedCommands.
entries.translation: 模型调用的所有 bash 命令必须在沙盒中运行，除非它们已明确列在 excludedCommands 中。

entries.original: Cannot block unix domain sockets (see Dependencies tab)
entries.translation: 无法阻止 Unix 域套接字（请查看“依赖项”标签）

entries.original: Commands will try to run in the sandbox automatically, and attempts to run outside of the sandbox fallback to regular permissions. Explicit ask/deny rules are always respected.
entries.translation: 命令将自动尝试在沙盒中运行，尝试在沙盒外运行时会回退到常规权限。显式的询问/拒绝规则始终会被遵守。

entries.original: Claude in Chrome works with the Chrome extension to let you control your browser directly from Claude Code. Navigate websites, fill forms, capture screenshots, record GIFs, and debug with console logs and network requests.
entries.translation: Claude in Chrome 通过 Chrome 扩展让您直接从 Claude Code 控制浏览器。浏览网站、填写表单、截取屏幕截图、录制 GIF，并通过控制台日志和网络请求进行调试。

entries.original: Claude in Chrome is not supported in WSL at this time.
entries.translation: Claude in Chrome 目前不支持 WSL 环境。

entries.original: Claude in Chrome requires a claude.ai subscription.
entries.translation: Claude in Chrome 需要 claude.ai 订阅。

entries.original: Site-level permissions are inherited from the Chrome extension. Manage permissions in the Chrome extension settings to control which sites Claude can browse, click, and type on.
entries.translation: 站点级权限继承自 Chrome 扩展。在 Chrome 扩展设置中管理权限，以控制 Claude 可以浏览、点击和输入的站点。

entries.original: When Claude needs stronger judgment — a complex decision, an ambiguous failure, a problem it's circling without progress — it escalates to the advisor model for guidance, then resumes. The advisor runs server-side and uses additional tokens.
entries.translation: 当 Claude 需要更强的判断力时——面对复杂决策、模糊的失败情况或陷入僵局的问题——它会向顾问模型寻求指导，然后继续执行。顾问在服务端运行，会消耗额外的 token。

entries.original: For certain workloads, pairing Sonnet as the main model with Opus as the advisor gives you near-Opus performance with reduced token usage.
entries.translation: 对于某些工作负载，将 Sonnet 作为主模型并搭配 Opus 作为顾问，可以在减少 token 消耗的同时获得接近 Opus 的性能。

entries.original: Remote Control lets you access this CLI session from the web (claude.ai/code) or the Claude app, so you can pick up where you left off on any device.
entries.translation: 远程控制允许您从网页端（claude.ai/code）或 Claude 应用访问此 CLI 会话，您可以在任何设备上继续之前的工作。

entries.original: You can disconnect remote access anytime by running /remote-control again.
entries.translation: 您可以随时再次运行 /remote-control 来断开远程访问。

entries.original: This session is available via Remote Control
entries.translation: 此会话可通过远程控制访问

entries.original: Claude on the web requires connecting to your GitHub account to clone and push code on your behalf.
entries.translation: 网页端 Claude 需要连接您的 GitHub 账户，以代您克隆和推送代码。

entries.original: Your local credentials are used to authenticate with GitHub
entries.translation: 使用您的本地凭据向 GitHub 进行身份验证
的配置文件包含无效的 JSON。

entries.original: Learn more about how to monitor your spending:
entries.translation: 了解更多关于如何监控您的开销：

entries.original: If this is a new task, clearing context will save usage and be faster.
entries.translation: 如果这是新任务，清除上下文将节省用量并加快速度。

entries.original: Resuming the full session will consume a substantial portion of your usage limits. We recommend resuming from a summary.
entries.translation: 恢复完整会话将消耗大量用量配额。建议从摘要恢复。
权限请求已发送给团队

entries.original: to the point before you sent this message:
entries.translation: 到你发送此消息之前的状态：

entries.original: Rewinding does not affect files edited manually or via bash.
entries.translation: 回退不会影响手动编辑或通过 bash 编辑的文件。

entries.original: Restore the code and/or conversation to the point before…
entries.translation: 将代码和/或对话恢复到之前的状态…

entries.original: Restore and fork the conversation to the point before…
entries.translation: 恢复并分叉对话到之前的状态…

entries.original: The code has not changed (nothing will be restored).
entries.translation: 代码未发生更改（无需恢复）。
跳过问答，立即制定计划

entries.original: You have not answered all questions

entries.translation: 准备好提交你的回答了吗？

entries.original: Do you want to make this edit to
entries.translation: 你要对以下文件进行此编辑吗

entries.original: Yes, allow all edits during this session
entries.translation: 是，本次会话允许所有编辑

entries.original: Yes, and always allow access to
Yes, and don't ask again for
Claude wants to enter plan mode to explore and design an implementation approach.
entries.translation: Claude 想要进入计划模式以探索和设计实现方案。

entries.original: · Present a plan for your approval
No code changes will be made until you approve the plan.
entries.translation: 在你批准计划之前不会进行任何代码更改。

entries.original: Claude wants to exit plan mode
entries.translation: Claude 想要退出计划模式
以下是 Claude 的计划：

entries.original: Claude has written up a plan and is ready to execute. Would you like to proceed?
entries.translation: Claude 已制定计划并准备执行。你要继续吗？

entries.original: Yes, and don't ask again for
Claude may use instructions, code, or files from this Skill.
entries.translation: Claude 可能会使用此技能中的指令、代码或文件。

entries.original: No, and tell Claude what to do differently
entries.translation: 否，并告诉 Claude 该怎么做

entries.original: Do you want to allow Claude to fetch this content?
entries.translation: 你要允许 Claude 获取此内容吗？

entries.original: Waiting for the server to confirm completion…

entries.translation: ✓ 更新已安装 · 重启以生效
✗ 自动更新失败 · 请尝试
✓ 更新已安装 · 重启以更新
apiKeyHelper 正在处理中，请稍候
空格键显示 QR 码

entries.original: Enable or disable thinking for this session.
entries.translation: 启用或禁用本次会话的思考功能。

entries.original: Changing thinking mode mid-conversation will increase latency and may reduce quality. For best results, set this at the start of a session.
entries.translation: 在对话过程中切换思考模式会增加延迟并可能降低质量。为获得最佳效果，请在会话开始时设置。

entries.original: select · Enter view · k kill · s shutdown · p prune idle
entries.translation: 选择 · Enter 查看 · k 终止 · s 关闭 · p 清理空闲

entries.original: sync cycle modes for all · Esc close
entries.translation: 同步切换所有模式 · Esc 关闭

entries.original: back · Esc close · k kill · s shutdown
entries.translation: 返回 · Esc 关闭 · k 终止 · s 关闭

entries.original: set macOptionClickForcesSelection in VS Code settings
entries.translation: 在 VS Code 设置中开启 macOptionClickForcesSelection
已暂存（提交后自动恢复）

entries.original: Save and close editor to continue...
entries.translation: 保存并关闭编辑器以继续...

entries.original: This will disable Remote Control for this session.
entries.translation: 这将在本次会话中禁用远程控制。

entries.original: Can Anthropic look at your session transcript to help us improve Claude Code?
entries.translation: Anthropic 可以查看你的会话记录以帮助我们改进 Claude Code 吗？

entries.original: ] to tell us what went well
Use /issue to report model behavior issues.
entries.translation: 使用 /issue 报告模型行为问题。

entries.original: Claude in Chrome requires a claude.ai subscription
entries.translation: Claude in Chrome 需要 claude.ai 订阅

entries.original: Chrome extension not detected · https://claude.ai/chrome to install
entries.translation: 未检测到 Chrome 扩展 · 前往 https://claude.ai/chrome 安装

entries.original: Failed to save marketplace retry info · Check ~/.claude.json permissions
entries.translation: 保存市场重试信息失败 · 请检查 ~/.claude.json 权限

entries.original: ✓ Anthropic marketplace installed · /plugin to see available plugins
entries.translation: ✓ Anthropic 市场已安装 · /plugin 查看可用插件

entries.original: Failed to install Anthropic marketplace · Will retry on next startup
entries.translation: 安装 Anthropic 市场失败 · 将在下次启动时重试

entries.original: Same Claude Code with visual diffs, live app preview, parallel sessions, and more.
entries.translation: 同样的 Claude Code，支持可视化差异对比、实时应用预览、并行会话等更多功能。

entries.original: Do you want to allow this connection?

entries.translation: 已安装 · 重启以生效

entries.original: LSP provides code intelligence like go-to-definition and error checking
entries.translation: LSP 提供代码智能功能，如跳转到定义和错误检查

entries.original: Would you like to install this LSP plugin?
entries.translation: 你要安装此 LSP 插件吗？
命令建议安装一个插件。

entries.original: Would you like to install it?
MCP servers may execute code or access system resources. All tool calls require approval. Learn more in the
entries.translation: MCP 服务器可能会执行代码或访问系统资源。所有工具调用都需要审批。了解更多请参阅

entries.original: Unable to connect to Anthropic services
entries.translation: 无法连接到 Anthropic 服务

entries.original: Please check your internet connection and network settings.
entries.translation: 请检查你的网络连接和网络设置。

entries.original: Note: Claude Code might not be available in your country. Check supported countries at
entries.translation: 注意：Claude Code 可能在你所在的国家/地区不可用。请在以下地址查看支持的国家/地区

entries.original: Do you want to use this API key?
entries.translation: 你要使用此 API 密钥吗？

entries.original: You should always review Claude's responses, especially when
entries.translation: 你应始终审查 Claude 的回复，尤其是在

entries.original: Due to prompt injection risks, only use it with code you trust
entries.translation: 由于存在提示注入风险，请仅在你信任的代码中使用
使用 Claude Code 的终端设置？

entries.original: For the optimal coding experience, enable the recommended settings
entries.translation: 为获得最佳编码体验，请启用推荐设置

entries.original: Quick safety check: Is this a project you created or one you trust? (Like your own code, a well-known open source project, or work from your team). If not, take a moment to review what
entries.translation: 快速安全检查：这是你创建或信任的项目吗？（例如你自己的代码、知名开源项目或团队的工作）。如果不是，请先检查一下

entries.original: ll be able to read, edit, and execute files here.
entries.translation: 将能够在此处读取、编辑和执行文件。

entries.original: In Bypass Permissions mode, Claude Code will not ask for your approval before running potentially dangerous commands.
entries.translation: 在绕过权限模式下，Claude Code 在运行可能危险的命令之前不会征求你的同意。

entries.original: This mode should only be used in a sandboxed container/VM that has restricted internet access and can easily be restored if damaged.
entries.translation: 此模式仅应在具有受限网络访问且可轻松恢复的沙箱容器/虚拟机中使用。

entries.original: By proceeding, you accept all responsibility for actions taken while running in Bypass Permissions mode.
entries.translation: 继续操作即表示你接受在绕过权限模式下运行时所采取操作的全部责任。

entries.original: --dangerously-load-development-channels is for local channel development only. Do not use this option to run channels you have downloaded off the internet.
entries.translation: --dangerously-load-development-channels 仅用于本地频道开发。请勿使用此选项运行从网上下载的频道。

entries.original: Please use --channels to run a list of approved channels.
entries.translation: 请使用 --channels 运行已批准的频道列表。

entries.original: Requires the Chrome extension. Get started at
entries.translation: 需要 Chrome 扩展。前往以下地址开始

entries.original: Claude in Chrome works with the Chrome extension to let you control your browser directly from Claude Code. You can navigate websites, fill forms, capture screenshots, record GIFs, and debug with console logs and network requests.
entries.translation: Claude in Chrome 通过 Chrome 扩展让你直接从 Claude Code 控制浏览器。你可以浏览网站、填写表单、截取屏幕截图、录制 GIF，以及通过控制台日志和网络请求进行调试。

entries.original: Site-level permissions are inherited from the Chrome extension. Manage permissions in the Chrome extension settings to control which sites Claude can browse, click, and type on
entries.translation: 站点级权限继承自 Chrome 扩展。在 Chrome 扩展设置中管理权限，以控制 Claude 可以浏览、点击和输入的站点

entries.original: Claude Code will restart to apply.
entries.translation: Claude Code 将重启以生效。

entries.original: Restarting Claude Code to apply the new model…
entries.translation: 正在重启 Claude Code 以应用新模型…

entries.original: Run claude --teleport from a checkout of
entries.translation: 从以下仓库的检出目录运行 claude --teleport

entries.original: This conversation is from a different directory.
entries.translation: 此对话来自不同的目录。

entries.original: Note: Some servers already exist with the same name. If selected, they will be imported with a numbered suffix.
entries.translation: 注意：部分服务器已存在相同名称。如果选择导入，将添加编号后缀。

entries.original: Please select the servers you want to import:
entries.translation: 请选择要导入的服务器：
已移除 MCP 服务器

entries.original: No MCP servers configured. Use `claude mcp add` to add a server.
entries.translation: 未配置 MCP 服务器。使用 `claude mcp add` 添加服务器。
正在检查 MCP 服务器健康状态…

entries.original: All project-scoped (.mcp.json) server approvals and rejections have been reset.
entries.translation: 所有项目级 (.mcp.json) 服务器的批准和拒绝状态已重置。

entries.original: You will be prompted for approval next time you start Claude Code.
entries.translation: 下次启动 Claude Code 时将重新提示你审批。
正在清理旧的 npm 安装...
正在安装 Claude Code 原生构建

entries.original: Setting up launcher and shell integration...
entries.translation: 正在设置启动器和 shell 集成...

entries.original: Try running with --force to override checks
entries.translation: 尝试使用 --force 运行以跳过检查

entries.original: Warning: You already have authentication configured via environment variable or API key helper.
entries.translation: 警告：你已通过环境变量或 API 密钥助手配置了认证。

entries.original: The setup-token command will create a new OAuth token which you can use instead.
entries.translation: setup-token 命令将创建一个新的 OAuth 令牌供你使用。
